guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not execute an installer fetched from a mutable branch.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: README resolves release metadata or published semver tags, then downloads only the resolved tagged installer.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: release.json remains the only mutable pointer to the current public tag.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: README prefers release.json; the temporary fallback derives only from immutable-named published tags while metadata is unavailable.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: New quality gates must pass on the current repository without blanket ignore settings.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Coverage, Ruff, Mypy typed core, Bandit medium/high, compilation, and documentation checks pass.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Partial type coverage must be labeled as a typed-core subset.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: All three READMEs state that Mypy currently covers an explicitly typed core subset.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not hand-edit generated cockpit status.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Status was generated by lifecycle commands.

risk.detail: Quick Start resolution and repository quality requirements affect every contributor and new adopter.

observedIssues: Public main does not yet expose release.json, so the verified command used the documented semver-tag fallback.
Strict Mypy over all runtime scripts currently reports historical type errors; the gate checks four explicitly typed core tools.
Bandit reports expected low-severity subprocess usage; medium/high findings are enforced.

residualRisks.detail: The highest currently published tag still lacks current source adoption capabilities; publishing a new tag remains required.
Mypy does not yet cover every runtime script; historical errors must be fixed before expanding the target list.
Nine stacks remain Preset only without real-project CI.

reviewReadiness.reason: README resolution, quality gates, rule references, architecture model, and terminology are corrected; publication and broader typing/stack work remain.

userCorrectionsCaptured: README primary install commands must not explicitly name a version.
userCorrectionSolidification: Documentation metadata rejects concrete README semver strings and requires tagged resolution.

checkpointEvidence.detail: Release resolution, measured quality baselines, rule references, support tiers, and Japanese model reviewed.
100 tests, 59.11 percent coverage, Ruff, typed-core Mypy, Bandit, remote install, release contract, and documentation checks reviewed.

knownGaps: A new public release containing current source capabilities has not been published.
Complete runtime Mypy coverage is not yet enabled.
Nine Preset-only stacks still lack real-project CI.
overclaimPrevention: Do not equate dynamic tag resolution with a new release, typed-core Mypy with full typing, or Preset-only templates with verified compatibility.
